ideal_environment: a private room · indoor · the actual real-world weather outside the room is irrelevant but the room itself should be still
headphone_conditions: closed-back over-ear · consumer 4-star+ or better · level set to absolute SPL ~64 dBA at the eardrum · loudness checked with a phone meter before playback
lighting_conditions: low ambient light · no overhead fluorescent · ideally just a single bedside or floor lamp · the room dims itself toward the screen
emotional_state: neither acute crisis nor performative calm · ordinary baseline · the viewer is themselves
contemplative_preparation: two minutes of doing nothing before opening the app · no transition from social-media scroll · no transition from a phone call · the head settles before the room
interruption_minimization: phone in Do Not Disturb · the app suppresses notifications during playback and for 12 seconds after · partner / housemates / pets informed · door closed
post_view_silence: two minutes minimum of doing nothing after the closing fade ends · phone face-down · eyes anywhere except a screen · the question is what stays
notes: the first viewing is not data collection · it is the moment AXÓN is allowed to exist for the first time. If the protocol is violated, the data is contaminated. If the data is contaminated, we will not know whether the capsule failed or whether the conditions failed. The protocol matters more than the eagerness to ship.
